'''powagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulodendroid|ulodendroid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulodendroid|ulodendroid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| powagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:powagithi|powagithi]] || [[word:powagiji|powagiji]] || [[word:powagishi|powagishi]] || [[word:powagiki|powagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:powaguthuthu|powaguthuthu]] || [[word:powagujuju|powagujuju]] || [[word:powagushushu|powagushushu]] || [[word:powagukuku|powagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:powaguthu|powaguthu]] || [[word:powaguju|powaguju]] || [[word:powagushu|powagushu]] || [[word:powaguku|powaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:powagufthuf|powagufthuf]] || [[word:powagufjuf|powagufjuf]] || [[word:powagufshuf|powagufshuf]] || [[word:powagufkuf|powagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:powagethe|powagethe]] || [[word:powageje|powageje]] || [[word:powageshe|powageshe]] || [[word:powageke|powageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:powagothotho|powagothotho]] || [[word:powagojojo|powagojojo]] || [[word:powagoshosho|powagoshosho]] || [[word:powagokoko|powagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:powagotho|powagotho]] || [[word:powagojo|powagojo]] || [[word:powagosho|powagosho]] || [[word:powagoko|powagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:powagofthof|powagofthof]] || [[word:powagofjof|powagofjof]] || [[word:powagofshof|powagofshof]] || [[word:powagofkof|powagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:powagÃŸfthÃŸf|powagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfjÃŸf|powagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfshÃŸf|powagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfkÃŸf|powagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:powagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|powagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|powagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|powagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|powagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:powagÃŸfthÃŸf|powagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfjÃŸf|powagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfshÃŸf|powagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfkÃŸf|powagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:powagÃŸfthÃŸf|powagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfjÃŸf|powagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfshÃŸf|powagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powagÃŸfkÃŸf|powagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:powagÃḊthÃḊ|powagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:powagÃḊjÃḊ|powagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:powagÃḊshÃḊ|powagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:powagÃḊkÃḊ|powagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:powagathatha|powagathatha]] || [[word:powagajaja|powagajaja]] || [[word:powagashasha|powagashasha]] || [[word:powagakaka|powagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:powagatha|powagatha]] || [[word:powagaja|powagaja]] || [[word:powagasha|powagasha]] || [[word:powagaka|powagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:powagafthaf|powagafthaf]] || [[word:powagafjaf|powagafjaf]] || [[word:powagafshaf|powagafshaf]] || [[word:powagafkaf|powagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:powagasha|powagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:powagshÃḋasha|powagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powagroasha|powagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powagmuasha|powagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:powagyaasha|powagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowagnkshÃḋasha|gopowagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowagnkroasha|gopowagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowagnkmuasha|gopowagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowagnkyaasha|gopowagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:powawagasha|powawagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powawagshÃḋasha|powawagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powawagroasha|powawagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powawagmuasha|powawagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powawagyaasha|powawagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowawagnkshÃḋasha|gopowawagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowawagnkroasha|gopowawagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowawagnkmuasha|gopowawagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowawagnkyaasha|gopowawagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pewÃḊgasha|pewÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pewÃḊgshÃḋasha|pewÃḊgshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pewÃḊgroasha|pewÃḊgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pewÃḊgmuasha|pewÃḊgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pewÃḊgyaasha|pewÃḊgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopewÃḊgnkshÃḋasha|gopewÃḊgnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopewÃḊgnkroasha|gopewÃḊgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopewÃḊgnkmuasha|gopewÃḊgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopewÃḊgnkyaasha|gopewÃḊgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:powfagasha|powfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powfagshÃḋasha|powfagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powfagroasha|powfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powfagmuasha|powfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powfagyaasha|powfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowfagnkshÃḋasha|gopowfagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowfagnkroasha|gopowfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowfagnkmuasha|gopowfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowfagnkyaasha|gopowfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
